recommendedOption: A. TeachingTaskClass minimal source evidence fields

ClassGroup model 字段: name / studentCount / cohortYear (parse 派生) / track (parse 派生)

currentTraceabilityMap.description: task 是否经过 cross-cohort approval

findings.title: TeachingTaskClass schema 已有 source evidence 字段 (K20-FIX-B completed)
findings.currentStatus: TeachingTaskClass model fields: sourceRow=true sourceKeyword=true sourceClassName=true sourceRemark=true sourceArtifact=true importBatchId=true matchStrategy=true matchConfidence=true. importer writes TTC sourceRow=true sourceKeyword=true importBatchId=true (teachingTaskClass.create with extras=false).
evidence: Missing fields out of 8 carrier candidates: 0
findings.risk: K20-FIX-B 已完成 schema + importer forward-fill. 历史 446 rows 保持 null (no-backfill policy). 残余风险: historical null 无回填; source artifact immutable storage / operator identity / frontend display 仍 deferred.
findings.recommendation: K20-FIX-B 已完成. 残余: historical null backfill (K20-FIX-C, optional) / source artifact immutable storage (K20-FIX-D) / operator identity (K20-FIX-B-IMPORT-EVIDENCE-MODEL-DESIGN).

findings.title: TeachingTask-level evidence 现状评估 (importBatchId / remark / crossCohort approval)
findings.currentStatus: TeachingTask model: importBatchId=true remark=true crossCohortApproved=true crossCohortApprovalReason=true approvedBy/operatorId=false approvedAt=false. importer writes: importBatchId=true remark=true crossCohortApproved=true crossCohortApprovalReason=true.
findings.risk: TeachingTask-level evidence 仅能解释 task 整体是否经 cross-cohort approval, 但不能解释每个 TeachingTaskClass link. 例如 task 37 有 3 个 link (CG3, CG17, CG35), 仅靠 task-level evidence 不知道 CG35 link 是如何创建的. 当前 task 37 已修复, 但未来若出现类似 case, 仍无法自动定位.
findings.recommendation: TeachingTask-level evidence 满足 K19 阶段需求. operator identity / timestamp 推迟至独立阶段 (K20-FIX-B-IMPORT-EVIDENCE-MODEL-DESIGN).

findings.title: ImportBatch.warningsJson 当前 structure 与查询能力
findings.currentStatus: ImportBatch.warningsJson field=true. warningsJson v2 (version: 2) 存在=true. crossCohortApprovals array 透传=true. 见 main 中 sample 提取.
findings.risk: warningsJson 是 JSON blob, 无法用 SQL 索引/查询/外键关联. 仅可整批 parse. 长期 audit trail 难以扩展. 不能定位到具体 TeachingTaskClass link 级别 (warnings 是 batch 级别, 不是 link 级别).
findings.recommendation: warningsJson 作为 batch-level 概要已够用. 但 per-link evidence 仍需独立 TeachingTaskClass 字段. 不在本阶段解决.

findings.title: ImportBatch source artifact path retention 与 filesystem drift 风险
findings.currentStatus: ImportBatch model: filename=true originalFilePath=true parsedJsonPath=true statsJson=true qualityJson=true. uploads/imports 目录存在=true, JSON 文件数=17. sample JSON records=585, sample record keys=class_info,teacher,course,room,day_of_week,time_slot,period_start,period_end,week_constraints,week_start,week_end,week_type,remark,student_count_raw,student_count, sample remark=n/a.
evidence: Sample JSON record keys: class_info, teacher, course, room, day_of_week, time_slot, period_start, period_end, week_constraints, week_start, week_end, week_type, remark, student_count_raw, student_count
findings.risk: originalFilePath / parsedJsonPath 仅存 path 字符串, 实际文件存在性 / 路径漂移 / 备份策略均依赖文件系统管理. 若 uploads/imports/ 目录被清理或路径重命名, batch-level 链接立即失效. 此外, JSON 内部行号 (source row index) 完全未持久化 — 即便 JSON 文件存在, 也无法直接定位到具体 record.parsedJson 数组 index.
findings.recommendation: 短期 OK. 中期建议: (a) source artifact 持久化至不可变存储 (S3 / 内部 object store), 路径 → hash 映射; (b) parser 在 record 写入时记录 source row index 字段. 建议作为 K20-FIX-B-IMPORT-EVIDENCE-MODEL-DESIGN 或独立 K20-FIX-D-SOURCE-ARTIFACT-IMMUTABLE-STORAGE 阶段.

findings.title: K18-B 4 tasks + K18-E3 task 37 historical case — 当前 evidence 强度评估
findings.currentStatus: K18-B 4 tasks (168/174/176/181) — TTC 349/361/366/377 deleted in 2026-06-03. K18-E3 task 37 — TTC 94 deleted. K18-C source review: EXISTS, 17 source JSON scan: true, source row / record index reference: false. 当前 evidence 全部依赖人工 cross-reference 17 个 JSON 文件, 无自动化 source row index 定位.
evidence: K18-C references 17 source JSON files: true
K18-C references source row / parsed row / record index: false
K19 root cause: weak matching + missing source evidence
findings.risk: K18-B 修复时需要人工对 17 个 source JSON 做交叉验证才能确认 4 个 task 错误 merge 是历史 import 误合并. K18-C 报告人工逐一搜索 17 个 JSON 确认 task 37 在 2024 cohort 无任何 source record. 这种人工诊断模式在 K19-FIX-B / K19-FIX-C 阶段被多次 deferred. K20-FIX-B 已添加 source evidence 字段, 未来类似 case 诊断时间将从 ~1 天缩短到 ~10 分钟 (但历史 446 rows 仍为 null, 诊断时仍需 cross-reference).
findings.recommendation: K20-FIX-B 已完成 source evidence 字段 + importer forward-fill. 历史 rows (446) 保持 null (no-backfill policy). 未来新 import 的 link 可直接通过 sourceRowIndex + sourceArtifactFilename 定位. 历史 rows 如需回溯仍需 cross-reference source JSON (K20-FIX-C, optional).

findings.title: 4 个 schema options 评估 (A: 最小字段 / B: 独立 model / C: 仅 warningsJson / D: 不改 schema)
findings.currentStatus: 已比较 4 个 options (A/B/C/D). 评估维度: 查询能力 / migration 风险 / rollback 复杂度 / forward-fill 兼容性 / audit trail 长期价值. 推荐: Option A (TeachingTaskClass 增最小 source evidence 字段). 详见 report.schemaOptions.
evidence: Option A: TeachingTaskClass minimal source evidence fields — queryable, low migration, recommended
Option B: TeachingTaskClassSource / ImportEvidence independent model — extensible, heavier, more migration
Option C: warningsJson enhancement — no schema change, weak queryability
Option D: docs/audit only — zero migration, zero traceability gain
Report contains schemaOptions array with full pros/cons for each
findings.risk: 若选 C 或 D, 未来诊断 / 修复 / 撤销 仍需依赖 warningsJson blob 解析 + 人工 cross-reference. 长期 audit trail 价值低. 若选 B, 虽可扩展, 但当前需求未达到独立 model 复杂度. Option A 是平衡点.
findings.recommendation: 推荐 Option A. 详见 recommendedOption + implementationPlan 字段.

historicalCaseReview.tasks: 168 (机械制图/赵春超), 174 (机械制图/张红梅), 176 (电子技术/许进), 181 (传感器与检测技术/张旭)
historicalCaseReview.wrongCG: CG22 (2024级钢铁智能冶金技术1班(高本贯通))
historicalCaseReview.diagnosisEffort: K17-FIX-A 报告 (HIGH=1, MEDIUM=9) 发现 4 个 cross-cohort task → K17-FIX-B review decision → K18 plan → K18-B 修复前需人工 cross-reference 17 个 source JSON, 确认 4 个 task 在 parsed JSON 中**只有 2025 cohort** 记录 → 修复 4 个 TTC link.
historicalCaseReview.improvementWithEvidence: 若 TeachingTaskClass 有 sourceRowIndex + sourceArtifactFilename 字段: 修复脚本直接定位 (4 个 task 各自的第一条 link → 找到 source row → 看到 row class_name = 2025级钢铁智能冶金技术1班(高本贯通) 而非 2024级), 无需 cross-reference 17 JSON. 诊断时间 ~30 分钟.

historicalCaseReview.case: K18-E3 task 37 (习近平思想/房忠敏)
historicalCaseReview.tasks: 37 (习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想概论/房忠敏)
historicalCaseReview.wrongCG: CG35 (2024级森林草原防火技术1班)
historicalCaseReview.diagnosisEffort: K17-FIX-B review 时被标记为 NEEDS_SOURCE_REVIEW → K18-C 报告 (2026-06-03T03:51) 人工搜索 17 个 source JSON 确认 "无任何 2024 cohort 房忠敏+习近平 记录" → 判定 LIKELY_ERROR → K18-E3 删除 TTC 94. 此报告本身是手工 cross-reference 产物.
historicalCaseReview.improvementWithEvidence: 若 TeachingTaskClass 有 sourceRowIndex + sourceKeyword 字段: (a) 修复脚本直接定位 CG35 link → 看到 source row 的 remark = 与森防合班 + class_name = 2025级钢铁智能冶金技术1班(高本贯通); (b) 同一 batch 内所有 task 37 link 共享 sourceKeyword, 自动汇总 "2024 cohort 房忠敏+习近平 task 37 link = 0"; (c) K18-C 报告变为 SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TeachingTaskClass WHERE classGroupId IN (2024 cohort) AND teachingTask.teacherId = 房忠敏. 诊断时间 ~10 分钟.

historicalCaseReview.tasks: 假设某 batch import 后出现 cross-cohort false positive
historicalCaseReview.diagnosisEffort: 当前: 人工 cross-reference N 个 source JSON + DB scan. 估计 0.5-2 天.
historicalCaseReview.improvementWithEvidence: TeachingTaskClass.sourceRowIndex + sourceArtifactFilename + sourceKeyword → 直接定位 link → 看到具体 row + class_name + match strategy. 估计 5-15 分钟.

schemaOptions.name: TeachingTaskClass minimal source evidence fields
schemaOptions.description: 在 TeachingTaskClass 表增字段: importBatchId Int? (FK) / sourceRowIndex Int? / sourceKeyword String? / sourceClassName String? / sourceRemark String? / sourceArtifactFilename String? / matchStrategy String? (EXACT / WEAK_INCLUDES / WEAK_SUBSEQ / AMBIGUOUS / DIRECT) / matchConfidence String? (HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW).
pros: 直接 SQL 查询: SELECT * FROM TeachingTaskClass WHERE sourceRowIndex = X AND sourceArtifactFilename = Y
Migration 简单: 仅一表增字段, 不改外键
importer 写入点 1 处: executeImportInTransaction 的 TeachingTaskClass.create
forward-fill 即可, 不需 backfill
可与 K19 warningsJson 协同 (warnings 描述 batch-level, 字段描述 per-link)
cons: 字段集中在 TeachingTaskClass 表, 表宽度增加 (但 SQLite 无 16KB 行限制问题)
每条 link 多个 nullable 字段, 部分历史 link (K18 修复前) 字段为 null
未来若要支持多 keyword / 多源 (跨 batch 合并), 字段不够灵活
schemaOptions.estimatedEffort: 0.5-1 天 (含 importer 修改 + verify 脚本)
schemaOptions.recommendedReason: 直接满足 K18/K19 historical case 诊断需求. 最小 schema 改动, importer 改动集中. 不阻塞其他主线. 与 K19-FIX-B1 (crossCohortApproved) 字段风格一致. forward-fill 即可, 无需 backfill.

schemaOptions.name: TeachingTaskClassSource / ImportEvidence independent model
schemaOptions.description: 新建 TeachingTaskClassSource 表: id / teachingTaskClassId (FK 1:1) / importBatchId (FK) / sourceRowIndex Int / sourceKeyword String / sourceClassName String / sourceRemark String / sourceArtifactFilename String / matchStrategy String / matchConfidence String. 可选 ImportEvidence 通用表 (per-evidence 1:N).
pros: 独立表, 不影响 TeachingTaskClass 主表宽度
可扩展 1:N (一个 link 可对应多个 evidence 来源 — 跨 batch 合并 / 历史合并)
可独立 archive / GC (老 evidence 单独表)
cons: Migration 复杂: 新表 + FK + index
JOIN 查询稍多 (TeachingTaskClass JOIN TeachingTaskClassSource)
1:1 模式下与 Option A 类似, 1:N 模式与当前业务场景 (1 link 1 source) 不匹配
importer 改动点增加 (需独立 evidence creation 逻辑)
与 K19 KISS 风格不匹配 — 字段直接放主表更直观
schemaOptions.recommendedReason: 当前业务场景 (1 link 1 source) 1:1 模型不必要. 1:N 模型未来 (跨 batch 合并) 才有价值, 但当前尚未实施跨 batch 合并. 增加 migration 复杂度, 收益与 Option A 相同.

schemaOptions.name: warningsJson enhancement only (no schema change)
schemaOptions.description: 不改 schema. 在 warningsJson 中追加新结构: { version: 3, generatedAt, perLinkEvidence: [{ ttClassId?: null, taskKey, classGroupId, sourceRowIndex, sourceKeyword, matchStrategy }] }. 在 importer 写入时填充.
pros: 与 K19-FIX-B1 warningsJson v2 模式一致
cons: JSON blob 无法 SQL 查询 / 索引
ttClassId 是 post-creation 引用, 在 dry-run 阶段无 id (需 2-step: dryRun 返回 tentative id, confirm 时 attach)
历史 link 无法 attach (perLinkEvidence 仅新 batch 有效)
parse 复杂 (需多步 JOIN 解析)
schemaOptions.recommendedReason: 虽然零 migration, 但 queryability 弱 (无法直接 SELECT TeachingTaskClass by source row). 长期 audit 仍需 parse JSON. 不解决 K18/K19 historical case 诊断的根问题.

schemaOptions.name: No schema change, docs/audit only
schemaOptions.description: 保持当前 schema. 完善 docs / audit scripts. 人工诊断仍依赖 17 JSON cross-reference.
cons: 不解决 traceability 根问题
K18/K19 模式 (deferred) 持续存在
schemaOptions.recommendedReason: 不解决任何问题. 仅是 K19 deferred 状态延续. 不推荐.

implementationPlan.description: K20-FIX-B already completed: TeachingTaskClass + 8 nullable source evidence fields + importer forward-fill. Historical 446 rows all null (no-backfill policy).
implementationPlan.migration: Done: npx prisma db push + prisma generate. backup: prisma/dev.db.backup-before-k20-source-evidence-schema-20260604154215.
implementationPlan.importerChanges: Done: executeImportInTransaction TeachingTaskClass.create + 8 fields via buildTeachingTaskClassEvidence.

verificationPlan: npm.cmd run build — 验证 TS 编译通过
npm.cmd run lint — 验证无新增 lint error (允许 312 problems baseline)
npx prisma validate — 验证 schema 修改后仍 valid (本阶段未改 schema, 仅生成 audit)
npm.cmd run test:auth-foundation — 53 passed / 1 failed (pre-existing ScheduleAdjustment ACTIVE mismatch)
npx.cmd tsx scripts/audit-source-evidence-traceability-k20-fix-a.ts — 本阶段 audit script
npx.cmd tsx scripts/audit-remaining-risk-rebase-k20.ts — 验证 K20 rebase summary 不变 (HIGH=0, MEDIUM=2, LOW=6, ACCEPTED=1, NONE=1, BLOCKING=NO)
openQuestions: parser (scripts/parse_schedule.py) 是否同步需要写入 sourceRowIndex 字段? 若需要, 属于 parser 改动, 需独立阶段或合并 K20-FIX-B.
matchStrategy 枚举值是否需要前后端统一? 建议 enum: EXACT, WEAK_INCLUDES, WEAK_SUBSEQ, AMBIGUOUS, DIRECT, REMARK_DERIVED.
matchConfidence 评估标准: 1 个 exact hit = HIGH; 1 个 weak pass cohort filter = MEDIUM; 1 个 subseq pass = LOW. 需 K20-FIX-B 实施时定义.
K19 cross-cohort approval 的 taskKey 是否需要冗余至 TeachingTaskClass? 备选: 单独 taskKey 字段. 建议 K20-FIX-B 实施时由 Audit 决定.
若历史 TTC 行 (446 行) 需要 backfill, 需关联 source JSON 回填 sourceRowIndex. 建议不 backfill, 仅 forward-fill, 历史 TTC 字段为 null 即可 (有 warning 标记: sourceEvidence = null).
closureCriteria: 新增 source evidence traceability audit 脚本 (本阶段: scripts/audit-source-evidence-traceability-k20-fix-a.ts)
新增 Markdown audit 文档 (docs/k20-source-evidence-traceability-audit.md)
新增 JSON audit 报告 (docs/k20-source-evidence-traceability-audit.json)
明确当前 evidence gap (Rule A-F 6 类发现)
明确推荐 schema / model 方案 (Option A)
明确下一阶段实施范围 (K20-FIX-B-SOURCE-EVIDENCE-SCHEMA-PLAN)
lint 无新增 error (baseline 312 problems 维持)
test:auth-foundation 无新增失败 (53 passed / 1 failed 维持)
不修改 DB / schema / migration / API / frontend / importer / parser / solver / RBAC (本阶段)
